summary: Phase 1: Public Access & Navigation testing complete. All 9 test scenarios PASSED. Public pages (/experts, /topics) load without login, navigation works correctly, CTA buttons redirect to /login for unauthenticated users.

minor.issue: Returns empty experts list - shows 'No experts found' message on public experts page
minor.priority: LOW - expected behavior per main agent note

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Public routes correctly defined in AppRoutes.jsx: /experts, /experts/:expertId, /topics
✓ PublicExpertsPage has header, search input, filter buttons, and footer
✓ PublicTopicsPage displays all categories including 'Fertility & Family Planning' with 'Coming Soon' badge
✓ Back button (data-testid='back-to-home-btn') navigates to / on both public pages
✓ Niro logo (data-testid='header-logo') links to / on public pages
✓ 'See More Life Topics' button navigates to /topics
✓ ResponsiveHeader NAV_ITEMS includes 'Home' with href='/' for logged-in users
✓ CTA buttons on public pages link to /login for unauthenticated users
✓ Topic tiles redirect to /login when clicked by unauthenticated users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 public access implementation verified. All public routes work correctly. 'Home' nav link in ResponsiveHeader for logged-in users cannot be tested without Google OAuth authentication.
